name: queueave
description: Plugins for QueueAve, the badminton queue management app. Operate live sessions, matches, players, and courts from Claude.

plugins.name: queueave
plugins.description: Operate QueueAve sessions from Claude: read sessions and players; create, start, end, and queue matches; manage courts, player levels, and session status via the QueueAve MCP server. Uses OAuth (Google sign-in) — no token required.
